title: Architecture-heavy PRD fixture
summary: The boundary between agent judgment and deterministic generation must remain explicit.

problem.statement: Planning quality degrades when product judgment and rendering responsibilities are conflated.
evidence: The workflow needs portable deterministic output without constraining agent discovery.

architecture_diagram.description: Agent discovery produces a manifest; the generator validates and publishes a portable bundle for human review.

system_context.description: The workflow uses repository evidence and user decisions without requiring a particular agent harness.

decisions.decision: Agents own product judgment; the generator owns deterministic publication.
decisions.rationale: The boundary preserves adaptability and repeatability.

risks.risk: The workflow assumes a Codex-specific preview or runtime.
risks.mitigation: Keep generation standard-library-only and make preview capabilities optional.
